Sandbox_VehicleClaimSystem_MaxClaimsPerP: Maximum number of vehicles a single player can claim. Set lower to prevent hoarding, higher to allow more personal vehicles.
Sandbox_VehicleClaimSystem_AbandonedDays: Number of real-world days (24 hours) without activity before other players can contest the claim. Set to 0 to disable (for testing), or higher to protect claims longer. Default: 7 days.
